subject: request for salary adjustment

i am writing to formally request a raise based on my consistent high performance and the significant contributions i have made over the past year. since taking on additional responsibilities last quarter, i have demonstrated my ability to deliver exceptional value to the company while managing complex projects with ease. my recent achievements in driving revenue growth further highlight the substantial value to the company that i continue to provide through my dedication.

after reviewing current market rates for similar roles, i believe my compensation should be adjusted to reflect the industry standard and my expanded scope of work. i am confident that aligning my salary with these benchmarks will motivate me to continue delivering outstanding results and maintaining the high standards our team expects. thank you for considering this request, and i look forward to discussing how i can continue to add value to the company in the future.
